specifications.units: All dimensions to be entered in inches

features: Dimensional data collection form for dual axle rear trucks
Includes side view, front view, and rear view diagrams
Captures tire dimensions, ground clearances, widths, and weights
Supports multiple wheel base configurations (longest, shortest, lowest clearance)
Shows center of gravity reference point on side view
Three-axle vehicle support (one front, two rear)
notes: Please be complete in entering dimensional data - determination in suiting lifting requirements is only as accurate and complete as the data received
Note any areas that may cause problems in vehicle lifting
All dimensions to be entered in inches
Check box if lowest clearance is equal to longest or shortest wheel base
